# @zakkster/lite-headless/combobox

createCombobox(options) -> ComboboxHandle

Single-select listbox-style combobox. Focus stays on the trigger; the listbox
uses the aria-activedescendant pattern (the trigger's aria-activedescendant
attribute names the highlighted item's id).

## Options

- open: WriteSignal<boolean>            -- external controlled mode
- defaultOpen: boolean = false
- onOpenChange(next, reason)            -- reason: 'trigger'|'api'|'escape'|'outside'|'select'|'tab'

- value: WriteSignal<any>               -- external controlled value
- defaultValue: any = null
- onValueChange(next, reason)           -- reason: 'select'|'api'

- placement: string = 'bottom-start'    -- 12 placements; same as popover
- offset: number = 4
- flip: boolean = true
- shift: boolean = true
- boundary: 'clipping'|'viewport'|HTMLElement = 'clipping'

- typeahead: boolean = true
- typeaheadTimeout: number = 500        -- ms before typeahead buffer resets
- loop: boolean = true                   -- ArrowDown at end wraps to start
- autoFocus: 'first'|'selected'|'none' = 'first'
- closeOnSelect: boolean = true
- closeOnEscape: boolean = true
- closeOnOutsideClick: boolean = true

- container: HTMLElement|null = document.body
- transition: boolean = false

## Returned

{
    open: ReadSignal<boolean>,
    status: ReadSignal<'closed'|'opening'|'open'|'closing'|'closed'>,
    setOpen(value, reason),
    toggle(),
    value(): currentValue,
    setValue(value, reason),
    attachTrigger(buttonEl),
    attachListbox(ulEl),
    attachItem(liEl, { value, label }),
    attachInside(el)                    -- mark external control as "inside" for outside-click
    destroy(),
    destroyed
}

## Keyboard model

trigger has focus throughout. When OPEN:
  ArrowDown / ArrowUp         move highlight (loops by default)
  Home / End                  jump to first / last
  Enter / Space               select highlighted, close (if closeOnSelect)
  Escape                      close without selecting
  Tab                         close (lets normal tab flow continue)
  <printable char>            typeahead (same-char cycles, mixed accumulates)

When CLOSED:
  ArrowDown / ArrowUp / Enter / Space    open
  <printable char>                       open + typeahead

## Slot conventions (for <lite-combobox>)

- [data-trigger]              -- the button (gets aria-haspopup="listbox")
- [data-listbox]              -- the ul/ol (gets role="listbox")
- [data-item][data-value="…"] -- each option (gets role="option", aria-selected)

## <lite-combobox> attributes

- open, value                 -- reactive, reflected
- placement, offset           -- positioning
- no-flip, no-shift           -- disable flip/shift
- no-loop                     -- disable wrap-around in arrow nav
- no-typeahead                -- disable typeahead
- auto-focus                  -- 'first' | 'selected' | 'none'
- no-close-on-select          -- keep listbox open after selection
- no-escape, no-outside       -- disable dismissal sources
- container, transition       -- same as dialog/popover

## States exposed on items

- aria-selected: 'true' when value matches; 'false' otherwise
- data-selected: present when value matches (for CSS hooks)
- data-highlighted: present on the keyboard-highlighted item
- aria-activedescendant on trigger: the highlighted item's id

## CSS contract

This primitive's painted attributes follow the canonical CSS contract
in `docs/CSS_CONTRACT.md`. See that doc for the cross-primitive
taxonomy (booleans like `data-open` / `data-disabled` / `data-loading`,
enums like `data-status` / `data-side`, ARIA pairings, host accessor
naming, and event naming).
